name: cnki-search
description: HTTP-based CNKI reference search CLI and Codex skill for finding papers and exporting citations.

interface.shortDescription: Search CNKI papers and export citations
interface.longDescription: Use the cnki Go CLI to search China National Knowledge Infrastructure over HTTP, inspect paper metadata, fetch references when available, and export GB/T 7714-style citations.
defaultPrompt: Search CNKI for papers about knowledge graphs.
Find recent CNKI papers and return GB/T 7714 citations.
Search CNKI by author and summarize the results.
